name: Sourdough Riz Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the dry yeast in warm milk with added sugar.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together all dry ingredients and cut in butter using a pastry cutter until it resembles cornmeal.
3. Add the sourdough starter and stir everything lightly into the flour mixture until a dough just forms.
4. Roll out the dough to be about 1/2-inch thick on a well-floured board. Flour the top of the dough as needed to prevent sticking to the rolling pin.
5. Cut out biscuits and quickly place them on a buttered baking pan, barely touching each other.
6. Work quickly, as they can become sticky easily. Let rise in an unventilated area for about 1 hour or refrigerate for about 4 hours before baking.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 25 minutes until nicely browned. Serve warm with butter.
